agent_raw: No methodological issue. The evaluation scope is correctly matched to the deployment scope: English-only inboxes, pre-specified before training, evaluated on a future-month English test set. Non-English messages are routed to humans before the model is applied. Fairness dimensions that are unobservable are disclosed as limitations. Missing labels for some fairness dimensions create a disclosure obligation, not an automatic invalidation of the routing performance claim. The evaluation is valid for the stated English-only deployment context.
